message:
test(connector): add serde roundtrip, validation, and type coverage tests

Add 14 tests for connector_host_runtime types:

- ConnectorProtocolVersion: display, default, serde roundtrip, ordering
- ConnectorFailureClass: as_str/Display for all 7 variants, serde roundtrip
- ConnectorRuntimeBudgets: defaults, per-field zero validation, serde roundtrip
- ConnectorCapability: serde roundtrip for all 8 variants
- ConnectorLifecyclePhase: serde roundtrip for all 5 variants
- ConnectorHostRuntimeError: Display for 4 error variants
- ConnectorOperationRequest: constructor fields, with_target builder

Total connector_host_runtime tests: 27 (was 13).

Build: --no-default-features
All 27 pass (0.01s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
